one_time_description: James Bay Settlement revenue recognized during the year
economic_notes: Nation has investments in multiple partnerships and business entities including Matullia Holdings LP, Xhamasung Holdings LP, Skungeenes Holdings LLP, 1161742 BC Ltd, Salish Sea Industrial Services Ltd, and BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP. Kosapsum Development Corporation is fully consolidated. Nation receives BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing.
notes: Auditor firm located at #303-2071 Kingsway Ave, Port Coquitlam BC - firm name inferred from partners listed (Chang, Keetley, Russell). Engagement partner is Katrina Russell CPA. One fully consolidated subsidiary (Kosapsum Development Corporation). Eight GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. James Bay Settlement revenue of $771,985 in 2024 (down from $1,285,899 in 2023) is a recurring settlement item. Large increase in deferred revenue from $4.1M to $6.2M. Significant interest income of $1,267,676 reflecting large cash balances. Capital lease of $4,347 remaining. Specific claims loans of $123,712. ISC funding excludes amounts that flowed through as deferred revenue. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + FNHA + BC Gaming + James Bay Settlement + Province of BC + Coast Salish + DFO + Other Federal = 2444817+94786+2470894+412761+771985+614955+69748+1380106+365747+443261 estimated. Net financial assets per Statement 3 is $28,565,243.
